variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of revenues appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of Revenues - Total', so nothing should be added separately.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to administrative/SG&A expenses appears in the operating section above financial lines. Therefore D&A is assumed embedded in the selected parent row 'Administrative Expenses', so nothing should be added separately.
